context_note: Turkey vs Paraguay, WC2026 Group C. Turkey slight favorite: λ_TUR=1.509, λ_PAR=1.042. FTR: Turkey 46.95%, Draw 27.97%, Paraguay 24.70%. RULE8 FIRES: draw=27.97% ≥25% → shrink all comparison props toward 50%; low-event/tight match expected. OU2.5 Under=54.22% → under lean. Cards market: 80.42% chance 3+ cards, Paraguay fouls more (50.18% most cards). Turkey dominates corners (90.15% vs 34.57% most corners market). Enciso is Paraguay's best attacking player (Brighton, creative midfielder/forward). RULE15 applies to Enciso mildly (PAR 24.7% win prob). Kökçü is Turkey's captain/playmaker (NO RULE15, Turkey is expected winner).

rules_applied.RULE8_fires: Draw=27.97% ≥25% → RULE8 active. Shrink all comparison props toward 50% by 3-5pp. OU2.5 Under=54.22% confirms under-lean (tight low-scoring match likely).
rules_applied.RULE15_Enciso_mild: Paraguay win prob 24.7% → mild RULE15 on Enciso (-5pp from illiq market). BUT RULE8 mitigates: Paraguay will be competitive (draw 28%), Enciso gets more opportunities than in a blowout loss. Net: mild -7pp → 0.47.
rules_applied.No_RULE15_Kokcu: Turkey is the EXPECTED WINNER (46.95%). Kökçü is Turkey's primary midfielder (captain). RULE15 does NOT apply. Estimate from illiq market with slight RULE8 shade.
rules_applied.No_2plus_offsides_family_Q3: Turkey 2+ offsides: Turkey is the ATTACKING FAVORITE. 10/10 NO family applies to DEFENSIVE UNDERDOGS only. Turkey will attack → genuine offside risk. λ_TUR_goals=1.509, λ_off estimated 1.0-1.2 → P(≥2)=0.26-0.34. RULE8 shrink → 0.32.
rules_applied.Q7_penalty_or_red: Penalty direct market = 0.3077. Add red card probability (~0.12-0.15 in high-card match, Cards OU4.5=0.47). Combined P(penalty OR red card) ≈ 0.40.
rules_applied.direct_markets: Q9: OU2.5 Under=0.5422. Q2: Most cards Paraguay=50.18%. Q8: FTR Turkey=46.95% (RULE1 with crowd).
rules_applied.RULE10_cards_fouls_proxy: Most cards: PAR 50.18% vs TUR 30.05%. Paraguay fouls more as slight underdog. Q5 (PAR more fouls) → moderate lean YES, but RULE8 shrink → 0.52.

Q1_Enciso_SOT.note: illiq market 0.5369. Mild RULE15 (PAR 24.7% win). RULE8 mitigates: match competitive, Enciso gets chances. -7pp → 0.47.

Q2_PAR_more_cards.note: DIRECT most cards market: Paraguay 50.18%. Essentially 50/50. No edge vs crowd here.

Q3_TUR_2plus_offsides.note: Turkey attacking favorite (NOT the 2+ offsides family). λ_TUR_goals=1.509 → λ_off≈1.0-1.2 → P(≥2)=0.26-0.34. RULE8 shrink → 0.32.

Q4_TUR_more_2H_corners.note: Skellam (λ_TUR_c_2H=2.35, λ_PAR_c_2H=1.85) → 0.60 raw. RULE8 shrink -3pp → 0.57. TUR -0.5 full-match corners covers 54.24% confirms direction.

Q5_PAR_more_fouls.note: Card proxy: PAR most cards 50.18% vs TUR 30.05%. PAR fouls more. RULE8 mild shrink toward 50% → 0.52.

Q7_penalty_or_red_card.note: Penalty market 0.3077 + red card add-on (~0.13 in high-card match, OU4.5=0.47). P(penalty OR red) ≈ 0.40.

Q8_TUR_wins.note: RULE1: FTR market 0.4695, crowd_est ≈ 0.50. avg(0.50, 0.47) = 0.485 → 0.48. RULE8 match makes draw/upset more likely.

Q9_2_or_fewer_goals.note: DIRECT OU2.5 Under = 0.5422. RULE8 slight boost → 0.54. Low-event match expected.

Q10_Kokcu_SOT.note: illiq market 0.4295. Turkey expected winner → NO RULE15. Slight shade for RULE8 competitive match → 0.40.

post_match_results.note_q2_failure: Turkey 2+ offsides YES → -20.26. Turkey was the ATTACKING favorite (not the 2+ offsides defensive-underdog family). But our 0.32 was still too low vs crowd 0.51. Turkey had to chase after conceding to Paraguay → accumulated offsides in their attacking buildup. Chasing match script inflates attacking team's offside count.
post_match_results.note_rule8_correct: RULE8 fired (draw=27.97%). Turkey 0-1 Paraguay = low-scoring result. Q8 (2 or fewer goals) YES → +5.35. Q7 (Turkey wins) NO → +8.00. RULE8 framework correct.

Q1_PAR_more_cards.question: Paraguay more cards
Q1_PAR_more_cards.note: Essentially push. Direct market (50.18%) was right.

Q2_TUR_2plus_offsides.question: Turkey 2+ offsides
Q2_TUR_2plus_offsides.note: Turkey attacking favorite. Chasing 0-1 deficit drove attacking buildup → offsides accumulated. We underestimated offside rate for chasing attacking team (λ_off higher than our 1.0-1.2 assumption).

Q3_TUR_more_2H_corners.question: Turkey more 2H corners
Q3_TUR_more_2H_corners.note: Tiny beat. Both at 57%, Turkey dominated corners chasing.

Q4_PAR_more_fouls.question: Paraguay more fouls
Q4_PAR_more_fouls.note: Small loss. Paraguay defended and fouled to protect 0-1 lead. Crowd was right (0.58) over our 0.52.

Q5_TUR_more_2H_SOT.question: Turkey more 2H SOT
Q5_TUR_more_2H_SOT.note: Skellam model correct. Turkey pressed heavily chasing 0-1.

Q6_penalty_or_red_card.question: Penalty or red card
Q6_penalty_or_red_card.note: Tiny win. Physical match delivered cards/penalty.

Q7_TUR_wins.question: Turkey wins
Q7_TUR_wins.note: Paraguay won 0-1. RULE1 paid off — we were at 0.48 vs crowd 0.54. Paraguay shock win.

Q8_2_or_fewer_goals.question: 2 or fewer total goals
Q8_2_or_fewer_goals.note: DIRECT OU2.5 Under market + RULE8 (draw 28%). Match finished 0-1. Under confirmed.

Q9_Kokcu_SOT.question: Kökçü SOT
Q9_Kokcu_SOT.note: Kökçü had 0 SOT. Slight shade from illiq market paid off.

Q10_Enciso_SOT.question: Enciso SOT
Q10_Enciso_SOT.note: Enciso 0 SOT despite Paraguay winning 0-1. Mild RULE15 on Paraguay forward was correct direction.

key_confirmations: RULE8 CONFIRMED AGAIN: draw=27.97% → 0-1 low-scoring result. Q7 NO (+8) and Q8 YES (+5.35) both captured.
RULE1 match-winner: our 0.48 vs crowd 0.54 for Turkey win → Paraguay won → +8.00.
Q2 failure: Turkey 2+ offsides. Chasing a deficit drives attacking team's offside count higher than Poisson model predicts.
